safest_plan.entry_basis: No IOTA-specific entry level exists. The only IOTA mention (zero_live, 2025-10-13) says 'accumulating spot' with no price. The attached chart is DOGE, not IOTA, so no level can be read for IOTA.
safest_plan.stop_basis: No IOTA structure was given by any source — no level to place a stop against.

stance_by_source.summary: Just a passing 'accumulating spot' note on IOTA, graded weak (2/10), with no entry price, no targets and no invalidation.
Chart attached to IOTA is actually a Dogecoin (DOGE) daily chart, so it carries no IOTA information.

conflicts: The chart filed under IOTA is a Dogecoin (DOGE) chart, not IOTA — none of its levels (the ~0.18 and ~0.20 buy zones, the 0.32 supply cap) apply to IOTA, so the text levels could not be corrected against it.
The single IOTA note only says 'accumulating spot' with no entry, target or invalidation, so there is nothing concrete to act on.
plain_english: There is only one weak, passing note on IOTA — that it is being slowly bought as a long-term spot holding — with no buy price, no profit target and no point at which the idea would be wrong. The price chart that came with it is actually a Dogecoin chart by mistake, so it gives no real information about IOTA. With nothing concrete to anchor a trade, do not buy yet — wait for an actual IOTA level or a fresh, clearer call before committing money.
